title: TABRA by Andreea Cornila Immerses and Inspires
description: TABRA is good drama – centering the dynamics of light, Cornila utilizes bold skylights and brilliant bulbs to center us in a different world.

title: ClassiCon debuts the Soft Stone Sofa by Gabriel Tan
description: Developed by German furniture brand ClassiCon, Gabriel Tan’s new Soft Stone Sofa takes on a sculptural, layered pebble form.

title: Basic Space: Designed for Calm, Built for Community
description: haat studio pairs a serene material palette with an open, lounge-like layout to foster connection as much as contemplation at Basic Space.

title: Aesop Presents The Factory of Light Installation in Milan
description: Crafted in Murano glass, Aesop presents the Apos? Table Lamp, its first foray into lighting – now available in a limited run of 500.

title: A Los Cabos Home Raises the Roof(s)
description: The 6,450-square-foot home by ESTUDIO Ignacio Urquiza Ana Paula de Alba luxuriates in the shade and solace afforded by a central courtyard.

title: STARK Celebrates Canadian Design + Craft in Their New Office
description: Architects at Canadian firm STARK highlight the region’s materials and craftsmanship in the design of their new office.

title: After 77 Years, You Can Now Live in the Eames Pavilion System
description: At long last, the Eames Pavilion System is available for purchase – bringing Charles and Ray's vision of the home to life.

title: This Spa Trades the Typical Playbook for Roman Civic Logic
description: Future Simple Studio designs RECESS Thermal Station, a 4,500 sqft social bathhouse in Montreal's Griffintown neighborhood.
